title: centaurium exaltatum
intro: Centaurium exaltatum, also known as tall blue centaury, is a perennial plant species in the gentian family, characterized by its blue flowers and tall stem. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurium exaltatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Centaurium exaltatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
